import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Replace a project-level ConfigMap"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/configmaps/{configmap}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Replace a ConfigMap in a project's namespace. All existing data
is replaced. Returns the updated Kubernetes ConfigMap resource.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
